_rationale: index_stats mode=types: same dispatch-only contract as mode-symbols/mode-references. Both binaries currently ignore the mode argument and return standard payload. Locks the types-mode entry point. Probe: /tmp/parity-iter4/index_stats___mode___types.{go,cpp}.json — both return ready-state body. Same single-shot Go/C++ timing residue and serialization-shape divergences as the other index_stats mode descriptors. See mode-symbols rationale for full divergence catalogue.

tiers._rationale_stable: Envelope only. Locks dispatch + no-throw + content[].type='text' frame; tighter text-body parity blocked on the same async-vs-sync timing + serialization-shape divergences documented on mode-symbols.
tiers._rationale_ignore: Same as mode-symbols: single-shot timing mismatch + Go/C++ payload-shape diff on timestamp serialization.
